mapper.select: SELECT b.img_size, b.img_url FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a JOIN tb_rcmmd_img_mang b ON a.disp_sn = b.disp_sn AND a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = #{recommendId} AND b.rcmmd_type_id = #{recommendType} /* only RC_SML_TR */ AND b.img_disp_type = #{imageType} AND b.os_type = #{osType} JOIN ( SELECT CASE DAYOFWEEK(NOW()) WHEN '1' THEN 'SUN' WHEN '2' THEN 'MON' WHEN '3' THEN 'TUE' WHEN '4' THEN 'WED' WHEN '5' THEN 'THU' WHEN '6' THEN 'FRI' WHEN '7' THEN 'SAT' END AS dfk_type UNION SELECT 'EVERY' ) c ON b.dfk_type = c.dfk_type ORDER BY a.disp_sn
